description_long: This handbag features a rounded, semi-cylindrical shape with a slightly flattened base, allowing it to stand upright. The exterior is covered in a textured, pebbled material that appears to be synthetic or genuine leather, giving it a subtle, tactile finish. A single, prominent zipper runs along the top length of the bag, providing secure closure and easy access to the interior. The color is a muted, cool-toned blue-gray, with the zipper in a contrasting metallic gold. There are no visible handles or straps attached to the body, suggesting it may be a clutch or pouch-style handbag. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible logos, patterns, or decorative embellishments.
description: A rounded, blue-gray handbag with a pebbled texture and a gold zipper running along the top. The design is minimalist and free of visible handles, logos, or decorations.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full length of the gold zipper and the symmetrical, tapered sides of the handbag.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the rounded, slightly flattened base and the pebbled texture of the blue-gray exterior.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down view, again highlighting the zipper and the bag's symmetrical, tapered profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same rounded base and textured surface.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; appears to be a clutch or pouch style with no straps or handles attached
attribute_closure_mechanism: Single gold zipper running along the top length of the bag
